'''âk-r-l-m''' ('''kakarlemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tubulate|tubulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-r-l-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tubulate|tubulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-r-l-m
|-
! Lemma
| kakarlemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikarlemoko|thikarlemoko]] || [[word:jikarlemoko|jikarlemoko]] || [[word:shikarlemoko|shikarlemoko]] || [[word:kikarlemoko|kikarlemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukarlemoko|thuthukarlemoko]] || [[word:jujukarlemoko|jujukarlemoko]] || [[word:shushukarlemoko|shushukarlemoko]] || [[word:kukukarlemoko|kukukarlemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukarlemoko|thukarlemoko]] || [[word:jukarlemoko|jukarlemoko]] || [[word:shukarlemoko|shukarlemoko]] || [[word:kukarlemoko|kukarlemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukarlemoko|thukarlemoko]] || [[word:jukarlemoko|jukarlemoko]] || [[word:shukarlemoko|shukarlemoko]] || [[word:kukarlemoko|kukarlemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekarlemoko|thekarlemoko]] || [[word:jekarlemoko|jekarlemoko]] || [[word:shekarlemoko|shekarlemoko]] || [[word:kekarlemoko|kekarlemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokarlemoko|thothokarlemoko]] || [[word:jojokarlemoko|jojokarlemoko]] || [[word:shoshokarlemoko|shoshokarlemoko]] || [[word:kokokarlemoko|kokokarlemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokarlemoko|thokarlemoko]] || [[word:jokarlemoko|jokarlemoko]] || [[word:shokarlemoko|shokarlemoko]] || [[word:kokarlemoko|kokarlemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokarlemoko|thokarlemoko]] || [[word:jokarlemoko|jokarlemoko]] || [[word:shokarlemoko|shokarlemoko]] || [[word:kokarlemoko|kokarlemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚkarlemoko|thĂŚkarlemoko]] || [[word:jĂŚkarlemoko|jĂŚkarlemoko]] || [[word:shĂŚkarlemoko|shĂŚkarlemoko]] || [[word:kĂŚkarlemoko|kĂŚkarlemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakarlemoko|thathakarlemoko]] || [[word:jajakarlemoko|jajakarlemoko]] || [[word:shashakarlemoko|shashakarlemoko]] || [[word:kakakarlemoko|kakakarlemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakarlemoko|thakarlemoko]] || [[word:jakarlemoko|jakarlemoko]] || [[word:shakarlemoko|shakarlemoko]] || [[word:kakarlemoko|kakarlemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakarlemoko|thakarlemoko]] || [[word:jakarlemoko|jakarlemoko]] || [[word:shakarlemoko|shakarlemoko]] || [[word:kakarlemoko|kakarlemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
